notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you tried to open does not exist.

forbidden.title: Forbidden
forbidden.body: You do not have permission to view this page.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.body: An unexpected error occurred. Try again or contact support.

outage.title: Cannot reach backend
outage.body: AutoSpider could not contact the backend service.
outage.checkBackend: Check if the backend service is running
outage.checkCors: Verify CORS / firewall is not blocking requests

smtp.title: Email notifications not configured
smtp.body: Get failure alerts in your inbox when a run errors out. Configure in Settings → Config → SMTP.

pikpak.title: PikPak integration not configured
pikpak.body: Set up PikPak credentials to mirror older torrents to PikPak cloud. Configure in Settings → Config → PikPak.

rclone.title: Rclone not configured
rclone.body: Configure Rclone for automatic deduplication and cloud sync. Settings → Config → Rclone.

proxy.title: Proxy not configured
proxy.body: If you need a proxy to reach javdb, configure it under Settings → Config → Proxy.

onboarding.footer: Step {current} of {total} · You can re-run onboarding from Settings

welcome.title: Welcome to AutoSpider
welcome.body: Let's get your console configured. This will take a couple of minutes — most steps are skippable.
welcome.pipeline:
Spider  →  Storage  →  qBittorrent  →  Notifications
  ⤷ JavDB     SQLite/D1     downloads        Email/optional
welcome.bullet1: Configure javdb session for ad-hoc scrapes
welcome.bullet3: Optional: proxy, PikPak, Rclone, email — set up later

javdbSession.title: Connect to JavDB
javdbSession.body: AutoSpider needs an authenticated session to scrape detail pages and actor lists. Either paste an existing cookie or sign in with credentials below.
javdbSession.cookieHint: Open javdb.com in your browser → DevTools → Application → Cookies → copy _jdb_session value.
javdbSession.notTestedYet: Test the connection or skip first

qbittorrent.title: Connect qBittorrent
qbittorrent.body: AutoSpider pushes magnets to qBittorrent's Web UI. We'll test the connection before moving on.
qbittorrent.urlHint: Include the protocol (http:// or https://) and the port qBittorrent is exposing. Default is 8080.
qbittorrent.notTestedYet: Test the connection or skip first

proxy.title: Proxy configuration
proxy.body: Configure HTTP proxies for spider, qBittorrent uploads, or PikPak transfers. Skip if you don't use a proxy.
proxy.modulesHint: Which modules should send traffic through the proxy. 'All' overrides the others.
proxy.testFirst: Test the proxy or switch to 'None'

firstRun.title: Try your first ingestion
firstRun.body: Choose how you'd like to start. Either launches a real run; nothing is destructive.
firstRun.runNowBody: Triggers the daily spider against the first 3 pages of javdb. Takes a couple of minutes. We'll jump to the Tasks page so you can watch it run.
firstRun.skipBody: Skip the test run for now and take a look around. You can launch ingestion any time from the Run page.
firstRun.runFailed: Could not start the daily run
firstRun.completeFailed: Could not mark setup as complete

run.subtitle: Trigger ingestion runs and watch logs live.
run.noJobIdInResponse: Server did not return a job id
run.advancedHint: Bypasses the standard daily/adhoc shortcuts and sends a raw SpiderJobPayload.

sessions.subtitle: Ingestion sessions written to D1 / SQLite. Rollback removes the writes; force-commit unblocks sessions stuck in finalizing.

drawer.noMovies: No movies recorded in this session.
drawer.noTorrents: No torrents recorded in this session.

rollback.title: Rollback session
rollback.subtitle: Preview the rollback first, then apply.

commit.title: Force commit session
commit.subtitle: Force-commit a session stuck in finalizing.
commit.dropPending: Drop pending writes instead of committing them
commit.warning: This bypasses normal commit guards. Use only when a session is stuck and you know the writes are correct.

tasks.subtitle: All ingestion runs that have happened on this instance.

settings.subtitle: Configuration, authentication, runtime capabilities, and appearance.

GIT_PASSWORD.label: Git Password / Token
GIT_PASSWORD.description: GitHub PAT used for git push (not a password)

GIT_REPO_URL.label: Git Repo URL
GIT_REPO_URL.description: Git remote URL for report auto-commit

QB_ALLOW_INSECURE_HTTP.label: Allow Plain HTTP for qB
QB_ALLOW_INSECURE_HTTP.description: Allow plain HTTP for qBittorrent Web UI

QB_VERIFY_TLS.label: Verify qB TLS Certificate
QB_VERIFY_TLS.description: Verify TLS certificates for qBittorrent connections

TORRENT_CATEGORY.label: Daily Torrent Category
TORRENT_CATEGORY.description: qBittorrent category tag for daily torrents

TORRENT_CATEGORY_ADHOC.label: Ad-Hoc Torrent Category
TORRENT_CATEGORY_ADHOC.description: qBittorrent category tag for ad-hoc torrents

AUTO_START.label: Auto-Start New Torrents
AUTO_START.description: Start daily ingestion automatically on API boot

DELAY_BETWEEN_ADDITIONS.label: Delay Between Additions (s)
DELAY_BETWEEN_ADDITIONS.description: Seconds to wait between qB torrent additions

SMTP_PORT.label: SMTP Port
SMTP_PORT.description: SMTP server port (587 for TLS, 465 for SSL)

SMTP_USER.label: SMTP Username
SMTP_USER.description: SMTP login username (usually the email address)

SMTP_PASSWORD.label: SMTP Password / App Password
SMTP_PASSWORD.description: SMTP server password or app-specific password

PROXY_MODE.label: Proxy Mode (single / pool)
PROXY_MODE.description: Proxy strategy: none, single, or pool

PROXY_POOL.label: Proxy Pool (JSON list)
PROXY_POOL.description: JSON array of proxy entries for pool mode

PROXY_POOL_MAX_FAILURES.label: Pool Max Failures Before Ban
PROXY_POOL_MAX_FAILURES.description: Max failures before banning a proxy from the pool

PROXY_MODULES.label: Modules That Use Proxy
PROXY_MODULES.description: Which modules use the proxy (spider, qbittorrent, pikpak)

LOGIN_PROXY_NAME.label: Preferred Proxy for Login
LOGIN_PROXY_NAME.description: Preferred proxy name for login attempts

LOGIN_ATTEMPTS_PER_PROXY_LIMIT.label: Max Login Attempts per Proxy
LOGIN_ATTEMPTS_PER_PROXY_LIMIT.description: Max login attempts per proxy before switching

LOGIN_MAX_FAILURES_BEFORE_PROXY_SWITCH.label: Failures Before Switching Proxy
LOGIN_MAX_FAILURES_BEFORE_PROXY_SWITCH.description: Consecutive failures before proxy rotation in login

LOGIN_VERIFICATION_URLS.label: Login Verification URLs (JSON)
LOGIN_VERIFICATION_URLS.description: URLs used to verify login success

JAVDB_USERNAME.label: JavDB Username / Email
JAVDB_USERNAME.description: JavDB account email for headless login

JAVDB_PASSWORD.label: JavDB Password
JAVDB_PASSWORD.description: JavDB account password for headless login

GPT_API_KEY.label: GPT API Key
GPT_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key for AI-assisted features

CF_BYPASS_SERVICE_PORT.label: Cloudflare Bypass Service Port
CF_BYPASS_SERVICE_PORT.description: Port of the CF bypass HTTP service

CF_BYPASS_PORT_MAP.label: Cloudflare Bypass Port Map (JSON)
CF_BYPASS_PORT_MAP.description: Port mapping for CF bypass containers

PAGE_START.label: Daily Crawl Start Page
PAGE_START.description: First page number for daily spider range

PAGE_END.label: Daily Crawl End Page
PAGE_END.description: Last page number for daily spider range

PHASE2_MIN_COMMENTS.label: Phase 2 Minimum Comment Count
PHASE2_MIN_COMMENTS.description: Minimum comment count for Phase 2 filtering

BASE_URL.label: JavDB Base URL
BASE_URL.description: JavDB base URL used by the spider

MOVIE_SLEEP_MIN.label: Movie Sleep Min (s)
MOVIE_SLEEP_MIN.description: Min seconds to sleep between movie page fetches

MOVIE_SLEEP_MAX.label: Movie Sleep Max (s)
MOVIE_SLEEP_MAX.description: Max seconds to sleep between movie page fetches

LOG_LEVEL.label: Log Level (DEBUG / INFO / WARNING / ERROR)
LOG_LEVEL.description: Logging verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR

UPLOADER_LOG_FILE.label: qB Uploader Log File
UPLOADER_LOG_FILE.description: Log file for qB uploader runs

PIPELINE_LOG_FILE.label: Pipeline Log File
PIPELINE_LOG_FILE.description: Log file for pipeline orchestration runs

EMAIL_NOTIFICATION_LOG_FILE.label: Email Notification Log File
EMAIL_NOTIFICATION_LOG_FILE.description: Log file for email notification runs

INCLUDE_DOWNLOADED_IN_REPORT.label: Include Already-Downloaded in Reports
INCLUDE_DOWNLOADED_IN_REPORT.description: Include already-downloaded movies in CSV reports

REPORTS_DIR.label: Reports Directory
REPORTS_DIR.description: Base directory for all generated reports

DAILY_REPORT_DIR.label: Daily Report Directory
DAILY_REPORT_DIR.description: Directory for daily ingestion CSV reports

PARSED_MOVIES_CSV.label: Parsed Movies CSV Filename
PARSED_MOVIES_CSV.description: Path to the parsed movies CSV output

HISTORY_DB_PATH.label: History DB Path
HISTORY_DB_PATH.description: Local SQLite path for MovieHistory / TorrentHistory

REPORTS_DB_PATH.label: Reports DB Path
REPORTS_DB_PATH.description: Local SQLite path for session/report data

OPERATIONS_DB_PATH.label: Operations DB Path
OPERATIONS_DB_PATH.description: Local SQLite path for operations data

PIKPAK_LOG_FILE.label: PikPak Log File
PIKPAK_LOG_FILE.description: Log file for PikPak bridge runs

PIKPAK_ROOT_FOLDER.label: PikPak Root Folder
PIKPAK_ROOT_FOLDER.description: PikPak root folder path for uploads

QB_FILE_FILTER_MIN_SIZE_MB.label: Minimum File Size to Keep (MB)
QB_FILE_FILTER_MIN_SIZE_MB.description: Minimum file size (MB) to keep during filtering

QB_FILE_FILTER_LOG_FILE.label: qB File Filter Log File
QB_FILE_FILTER_LOG_FILE.description: Log file for qB file-filter runs

RCLONE_FOLDER_PATH.label: Rclone Remote Folder
RCLONE_FOLDER_PATH.description: Rclone remote path for dedup scanning

STORAGE_BACKEND.label: Storage Backend (sqlite / d1 / dual)
STORAGE_BACKEND.description: Storage backend: sqlite, d1, or dual

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.label: Cloudflare Account ID
CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Cloudflare account ID for D1 API calls

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.label: Cloudflare API Token
CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.description: Cloudflare API token with D1 permissions

D1_HISTORY_DB_ID.label: D1 History DB ID
D1_HISTORY_DB_ID.description: Cloudflare D1 database ID for history data

D1_REPORTS_DB_ID.label: D1 Reports DB ID
D1_REPORTS_DB_ID.description: Cloudflare D1 database ID for reports data

D1_OPERATIONS_DB_ID.label: D1 Operations DB ID
D1_OPERATIONS_DB_ID.description: Cloudflare D1 database ID for operations data

PROXY_COORDINATOR_URL.label: Proxy Coordinator URL
PROXY_COORDINATOR_URL.description: URL of the Proxy Coordinator Worker

PROXY_COORDINATOR_TOKEN.label: Proxy Coordinator Token
PROXY_COORDINATOR_TOKEN.description: Auth token for the Proxy Coordinator Worker

RCLONE_INVENTORY_CSV.label: Rclone Inventory CSV
RCLONE_INVENTORY_CSV.description: Path to the rclone inventory CSV

DEDUP_CSV.label: Dedup Result CSV
DEDUP_CSV.description: Path to the rclone dedup CSV log

DEDUP_LOG_FILE.label: Dedup Log File
DEDUP_LOG_FILE.description: Log file for rclone dedup runs

INGESTION_MODE.label: Ingestion Mode (local / github / dual)
INGESTION_MODE.description: How ingestion runs: local, github, or dual

API_SECRET_KEY.label: API JWT Secret Key
API_SECRET_KEY.description: Secret key for signing JWT tokens

ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH.label: Admin Password Hash (bcrypt)
ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH.description: Bcrypt hash used for admin login

READONLY_PASSWORD_HASH.label: Read-Only Password Hash (bcrypt)
READONLY_PASSWORD_HASH.description: Bcrypt hash used for read-only user login

GH_ACTIONS_TIER.label: GitHub Actions Tier (none / monitor / edit / admin)

COOKIE_SECURE.label: Set Secure Flag on Cookies
COOKIE_SECURE.description: Require HTTPS for auth cookies (disable for local dev)

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.tooShort: New password must be at least {n} characters.

proxyPool.empty: No proxies configured yet. Click 'Add proxy' to add one.
proxyPool.confirmDeleteBody: This will remove the entry from your pool. Other proxies are unaffected.

movies.subtitle: Search and explore movie history records

torrents.subtitle: Search and explore torrent history records

qb.subtitle: Manage qBittorrent torrents and filter small files.

pikpak.subtitle: Manage PikPak transfer queue and batch transfer torrents.

rclone.subtitle: View rclone inventory and run deduplication.

email.subtitle: Send test emails and view notification history.

cleanup.subtitle: Clean up stale sessions and sweep claim stages.

health.subtitle: Check backend subsystem health and connectivity.
health.noResult: Click "Run Deep Check" to inspect all subsystems.

parse.subtitle: Test the backend HTML parser with raw HTML or a live URL.
parse.noResult: Submit HTML or a URL to see the parsed result.

javdb.subtitle: Inspect and refresh the JavDB session cookie.

ghActions.subtitle: Monitor GitHub Actions workflows and runs.

browse.title: Browse
browse.subtitle: Resolve a video code or javdb URL, explore lists, and preview pages parsed by the backend.

toolbar.placeholder: Enter video code (e.g. ABC-123) or javdb.com URL

cookieSync.hint: Paste a fresh _jdb_session cookie value to update the backend session.

resolve.empty: Search for a video code or URL to see results here.

oneClick.noUrl: No detail URL available for one-click.

code.noResults: No javdb results found for code "{code}".

magnet.empty: No magnets available for this entry.
magnet.noMagnet: Magnet URI missing on this row.

lists.empty: No results yet — enter a URL above and click Load.

preview.sandboxNote: Sandboxed read-only snapshot of what the backend fetched. Scripts and navigation are disabled.
preview.empty: Enter a URL and click Fetch preview to see the sanitized HTML.

logs.subtitle: Search task execution logs by keyword.
logs.truncated: Results truncated. Refine your search for more precise results.
logs.empty: Enter a search term to search task logs.

stats.subtitle: Aggregated metrics and trends across all ingestion runs.

migrations.subtitle: View and preview D1 SQL migration files.
migrations.applyDisabled: Remote execution not yet supported. Use Wrangler CLI.
